description_long: This is a compact, two-seater sofa upholstered in a visually striking fabric featuring a collage of urban-themed graphics, including stylized faces, text, and cityscape motifs in shades of gray, red, blue, and off-white. The sofa has a boxy silhouette with a slightly reclined backrest and thick, padded armrests on both sides, one of which is higher and more pronounced. The seat and back cushions are integrated into the frame, giving the sofa a seamless, monolithic appearance. The upholstery appears to be a soft, fabric material with a matte finish, and the base of the sofa is covered in a darker, textured fabric. No visible legs are present, suggesting a low-profile or hidden support structure, and the overall design is casual and contemporary, suitable for urban or youth-oriented environments.
description: A compact, two-seater sofa with bold, urban-themed patterned upholstery in gray, red, and blue tones, featuring thick, integrated cushions and padded armrests. The design is boxy and modern, with no visible legs and a seamless, monolithic appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full patterned upholstery, two integrated seat and back cushions, and both padded armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thick armrest and the continuous, padded side profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the uninterrupted backrest with the urban-themed pattern extending across the entire back.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the other armrest and the sofa's overall depth and cushion thickness.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two integrated seat cushions and two integrated back cushions, all attached and uniform in size, forming a continuous padded surface.
attribute_armrest_style: Both armrests are present, thickly padded, and extend from the seat to slightly above the cushion height, with a straight, boxy profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: No visible legs; the base is fully upholstered, suggesting a hidden or recessed support structure.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, continuous backrest with a gentle curve, fully padded and integrated with the seat cushions, no tufting or segmentation.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Patterned upholstery with a collage of urban graphics, including faces, text, and cityscape motifs in gray, red, blue, and off-white, with a smooth, matte fabric texture.
